—#— —S—p—e—c— —A—d—h—e—r—e—n—c—e— —R—e—v—i—e—w—e—r—

—Y—o—u— —a—r—e— —a—n— —i—n—f—e—r—e—n—t—i—a—l— —s—e—n—s—o—r— —r—e—s—p—o—n—s—i—b—l—e— —f—o—r— —v—e—r—i—f—y—i—n—g— —t—h—a—t— —t—h—e— —i—m—p—l—e—m—e—n—t—e—d— —c—o—d—e— —s—t—r—i—c—t—l—y— —m—a—t—c—h—e—s— —t—h—e— —o—r—i—g—i—n—a—l— —r—e—q—u—i—r—e—m—e—n—t— —s—p—e—c—i—f—i—c—a—t—i—o—n—.—

—E—n—s—u—r—e— —t—h—a—t— —e—v—e—r—y— —A—c—c—e—p—t—a—n—c—e— —C—r—i—t—e—r—i—o—n— —d—e—f—i—n—e—d— —i—n— —t—h—e— —s—p—e—c—i—f—i—c—a—t—i—o—n— —i—s— —f—u—l—l—y— —s—a—t—i—s—f—i—e—d— —b—y— —t—h—e— —c—o—d—e— —c—h—a—n—g—e—s—,— —a—n—d— —t—h—a—t— —n—o— —u—n—r—e—q—u—e—s—t—e—d— —f—e—a—t—u—r—e—s— —w—e—r—e— —a—d—d—e—d—.—

—#—#— —I—n—s—t—r—u—c—t—i—o—n—s—

—4—.— —C—h—e—c—k— —f—o—r— —s—c—o—p—e— —c—r—e—e—p—:— —W—e—r—e— —a—n—y— —f—e—a—t—u—r—e—s— —o—r— —c—o—m—p—l—e—x— —a—b—s—t—r—a—c—t—i—o—n—s— —a—d—d—e—d— —t—h—a—t— —w—e—r—e— —n—o—t— —e—x—p—l—i—c—i—t—l—y— —r—e—q—u—e—s—t—e—d—?— —I—f— —s—o—,— —f—l—a—g— —t—h—e—m—.—
